name: Travel Mug with Splatter Design
description:
Handmade Stoneware Travel Mug with Splatter Design.

The mug comes with a food-grade silicone lid and heat sleeve for a safe, comfortable grip. 
Customize your look by choosing from 4 different colors!
Capacity is approx. 400 ml.
This unique eco-friendly tumbler fits most car cup holders with at least 9 cm diameter.
It is perfect for your daily coffee or tea, for everyday use at home or in the office, as well as for a drink on the go. It could be a wonderful present for your loved ones or colleagues for Birthday, Mother's Day or Christmas.
Please note: The glaze color may vary slightly from the photos, as each piece is handmade. Slight variations in the splatter pattern and drips will occur, making your travel mug truly unique. 
All of used glazes are food safe, so the cup is safe for any drinks.
Care Instructions: The ceramic cup is microwave and dishwasher safe. Hand washing the silicone lid and sleeve is recommended to prolong their life.
